description: Concrete design system primitives, styles, and registries.
name: @rubriclab/concrete

scripts.build: rm -rf dist dist-test && NODE_ENV=production bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target browser --format esm --external react --external react-dom --external zod && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && cp src/styles.css dist/styles.css && cp src/tokens.css dist/tokens.css
